About
The system, not the symptom.

Strategic People & HR Business Partner leader with 11+ years across Q-commerce, e-commerce, retail, technology, automotive, and manufacturing.

My edge is the combination most HR leaders only have one half of: the compliance rigor of a Law background, and the commercial, data-driven instinct of an operator who reads the business as well as the org chart.

I partner closely with C-level and operations leadership to turn people strategy into measurable outcomes — lower attrition, eliminated compliance exposure, faster hiring, and HR systems leaders can actually steer by. Across noon, talabat, Raya, and now Rabbit Mart, I take on broken or undefined HR mandates and leave behind frameworks, dashboards, and policies that outlast me.

Signature Work
Achievements that moved the business
noon

Disciplinary matrix & ER metrics built from the ground up

Designed noon's disciplinary matrix and employee-relations metrics framework from scratch, in close partnership with Operations — giving the business a structured, defensible way to handle behavior, attendance, and fraud cases. The framework directly lifted retention and drove turnover down across the workforce.

noon

From investigation data to action plans

Analyzed case volumes surfaced by the new metrics framework — behavior, attendance, and fraud — across multiple years of investigations, then built joint action plans with Operations that measurably reduced incidents and termination cases.

noon

Attrition down 11% → 8% (avg. 5% in 2025)

Re-architected employer branding, expanded sourcing channels, and launched targeted retention programs that drove operations turnover from 11% down to 8%, averaging 5% across 2025 — stabilizing the workforce behind a high-volume operation.

noon

500+ successful hires — every level, every function

Hired more than 500 employees across noon Food, noon Minutes, Commercial, Logistics, and Warehouse during my tenure — spanning every level from blue-collar to Associate Director — with a retention floor of 1+ year. Built a workforce depth that gave the business the people it needed to scale without compromise.

noon

~EGP 22M compliance exposure eliminated

Cleared an 800-employee social-insurance enrollment backlog, waived roughly EGP 20M in annual fines, and saved a further EGP 2.25M through sick-leave optimization — reaching 100% compliance across payroll, leaves, and contracts.

noon

Three HRIS migrations + live analytics

Led three enterprise HRIS migrations for employee data and leave management, then built a real-time, AI-assisted HR analytics dashboard on Google Workspace — giving leadership live visibility into headcount, attrition, and workforce KPIs.

noon

Built a full performance management system from scratch

Designed and implemented an end-to-end performance system — the full appraisal cycle, bell-curve calibration methodology, PIP framework, and succession plans — all anchored to company competencies and values, giving leadership a fair, data-driven view of talent and a clear pipeline for critical roles.

noon

Four years of Yellow Friday Sale — “Awesome Leader” 2023

Helped deliver four consecutive years of successful Yellow Friday Sale (YFS) — the region's largest sales event — on both the business and people fronts, ensuring workforce readiness and flawless execution under peak demand. Recognized with the YFS 2023 “Awesome Leader” award.

YFS 2025 post → YFS 2024 post →
talabat

Monthly dismissals 60+ → 3–4 (~93% reduction)

Redesigned the disciplinary and quality-failure framework and rebuilt HR policies and handbooks for full legal compliance — cutting monthly dismissal cases from 60+ to just 3–4 while raising engagement, not enforcement.

Peak Season Leadership
Yellow Friday Sale — 4 years of impact

Across four consecutive years, I helped deliver noon's Yellow Friday Sale (YFS) — the region's largest sales event — on both the business and people fronts: workforce planning, surge hiring, readiness, and flawless execution under peak demand. The two posts below capture the business and people achievements behind each successful season.

YFS 2025 — business & people achievements View post →YFS 2024 — business & people achievements View post →

Expertise
What I can build for you

I don't just run HR processes — I build the systems a scaling business runs on. Hand me an undefined or broken people function and I'll leave behind the frameworks, dashboards, and policies that outlast me.

I build performance systems end-to-end

Full appraisal cycles, bell-curve calibration, PIP frameworks, and succession plans — all anchored to company competencies and values.

I turn people data into decisions

Live HRIS dashboards and analytics that show leadership attrition, headcount, and workforce risk in real time — and the action plans that move them.

I make compliance a non-issue

Payroll accuracy, social-insurance clearance, and labor-law-tight policies across Egypt, UAE, and KSA — eliminating multimillion-EGP exposure.

I scale hiring under pressure

End-to-end recruitment and workforce forecasting that fill stores, warehouses, and support floors on time — even through peak events like Yellow Friday.

I partner where decisions are made

A trusted advisor to COOs, GMs, and operations leadership — translating business goals into people strategy, not just HR tickets.

I fix the system, not the symptom

Disciplinary matrices, ER frameworks, and root-cause action plans that cut dismissals and lift retention at the same time.
